Gerard van Honthorst

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Merry Fiddler
by Gerard van Honthorst
Utrecht Caravaggism · 1623
A fiddler leans out of a window frame, raising his glass to the viewer — a character study made a picture. Honthorst brought Caravaggio's candle-lit night scenes home to the Netherlands.
←Gu Hongzhong Gerrit van Honthorst→
